# discNumber

**Instance Property**

The index (1, 2, 3, and so on) of the disc within an album that’s a multiple-disc set.

## Declaration

```swift
var discNumber: Int { get }
```

## Discussion

If the album isn’t part of a multiple-disc set, this property is `0`.

## Getting Album Info

- **trackCount**: The number of tracks in the album.
- **title**: The title of the album.
- **sortTitle**: The title to use when sorting by album title.
- **rating**: The rating of the album.
- **isRatingComputed**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the system computes the rating of the album using the ratings of individual tracks in the album.
- **isGapless**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the album is gapless.
- **discCount**: The number of discs in a multiple-disc set.
- **isCompilation**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the album is a compilation.
- **albumArtist**: The name of the artist iTunes associates with the album.
- **sortAlbumArtist**: The name to use when sorting by album artist.
- **persistentID**: The unique identifier of the album.
